description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house set on a spacious green lawn with a paved driveway and walkways. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and multiple dormer windows, giving it a classic Craftsman-inspired appearance. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by wooden columns, and the entryway is accentuated by a set of steps and a wooden door. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, with a mix of single and double-hung styles, and the exterior walls are clad in horizontal siding with some stone or brick accents. A detached garage is visible to one side, connected by a paved path, and there is a fenced backyard area. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, making it suitable for a residential neighborhood setting.
description: A spacious two-story Craftsman-style house with a gable roof, covered porch, symmetrical windows, and a detached garage, set on a large green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, symmetrical windows, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the paved walkway extending around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, rear porch, and additional access points to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, driveway, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden columns, steps, and a central wooden door
